description_long: This hatchback car features a rugged, post-apocalyptic design with a weathered, two-tone exterior of white and brown. The vehicle is heavily modified, sporting a large, cylindrical turret mounted on the roof equipped with dual-barrel weaponry, and an additional heavy gun attached to the hood. The body is boxy with angular lines, and the windows are partially covered, suggesting reinforced protection. The wheels are standard for a hatchback, but the overall appearance is militarized, with visible pipes and mechanical details along the sides. The rear of the car includes a mesh-covered window and a single exhaust pipe, while the front is dominated by the mounted weapon and armored hood.
description: A weathered, militarized hatchback car with a roof turret, hood-mounted gun, and reinforced bodywork in white and brown.
description_view_0: Side view showing the turret, hood gun, and side pipes, highlighting the car's rugged modifications.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the large hood-mounted gun and armored windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the turret, side pipes, and rear mesh window.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the mesh-covered rear window, taillights, and single exhaust pipe.
